text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Is Air Groove seriously still talking withthe teacher?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Look at my poor tail and ears... Even<n>they're
bored out of their minds!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Is that so? I don't think that much time<n>has
passed.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You're just too patient, Prez! And whyare you suddenly so free anyway? You'realways busy!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I simply have no pressing matters that<n>need my
attention. I thought this would<n>be a good time to
stretch my legs, so to<n>speak.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Besides, it's not often that I have time to<n>chat
with you, so I'd like it to last a<n>while.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! ♪ Well, if that's what you want, Isuppose I can stick around a liiittlelonger!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So whatcha wanna talk about? The day<n>we first
met?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Whatever you please. I simply wish to<n>hear you
speak with joy in your voice.
